title: ダイワスカーレット登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As of today, I'll be taking on the Twinkle Series
with Daiwa Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can barely contain my excitement as I go to tell
her the good news.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've collected everyone's assignments. They're on
your desk.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you! Sorry for the trouble. I'm sure you
must be busy, what with your debut coming up
soon...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, no, it's my pleasure. Please let me know if you
need help with anything else!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, check out the model student! Wanna take
my class shift while you're at it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: With pleasu—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I mean, ex-cuse me?! Give me a break, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Look at that scowl! So much for your goody
two-shoes act!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Grrrr!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! How about you drop the delinquent act,
yourself? You just want more time to train, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wha—?! No, I don't!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Vodka. Great timing. I have something I need
to talk to you about.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Serves you right! Now you're going to get a
lecture!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Well, I suppose that's true in a sense.
Well? Have you given some thought to what we
discussed?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You mean about the interview? I dunno, it's
kinda—

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
A great opportunity, right? "Enter the rising star!
Our number one up-and-comer!" They've already
reached out to you, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ugh, now I really don't wanna do it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I haven't even debuted yet! I don't wanna look
like a poser!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Now just wait a—really! That Vodka, I swear! She
could have at least heard me out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Our number one up-and-comer. Not me, but her...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: N-No, that's not...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Trainer? Why are you here?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Don't give me that! Idiot!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um... I heard somebody shouting just now... Was
that you, Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
O-of course not! ♪ It must have been... someone
else! Come on, Trainer, let's be on our way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Seriously... I almost lost my reputation as a model
student because of you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do you think that'll cut it?! Hmph! You need to
apologize properly!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So? Since you came all this way to find me, I
guess it's finally happening, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: My debut.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, we'll both need to work hard from
here on out. No slacking off, not even for a
second.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The number one spot is mine. I won't let anyone
take it from me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And as for you... I hope you know what you're
doing. You're my trainer, after all.
choice_data_list: I'll make you the number one Umamusume.
I'll make you the number one Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I wouldn't settle for anything less.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Let's show the world who the
real number one is.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Who cares about landing interviews? Who cares
about being a rising star? I'm the best racer of
them all—and I'm going to prove it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, my journey to make Daiwa Scarlet the
number one Umamusume begins!
